summary: Enterprise Live Operations Modules - Complete Testing. All 4 new modules tested: 1) Real WebSocket Push with authenticated sessions (in-memory WS but REST API working), 2) Third-Party Messaging (Twilio/SendGrid/WhatsApp in MOCK mode), 3) Revenue Auto-Pricing Workflow with approve/reject/rollback, 4) Cross-Module Deep Integration (10 pathways). All 38 backend pytest tests pass. Frontend dashboard loads with 4 tabs and all interactive features work correctly.

issues: Some results show [object Object] for adjustments/metrics fields - minor display issue, actual data is present

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket Hub: Well-implemented with tenant isolation, role-based filtering, heartbeat, and event replay buffer
Messaging Gateway: Clean provider abstraction with Twilio/SendGrid/WhatsApp - all in mock mode (no API keys configured)
Auto-Pricing Workflow: Full lifecycle - create recommendation → approve/reject → apply → rollback with audit trail
Cross-Module Bus: 10 integration pathways connecting hotel modules with proper MongoDB persistence
All enterprise endpoints properly authenticated via get_current_user dependency
Turkish language UI labels correctly implemented throughout
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 tabs load, all interactive features work)

seed_data_creation: Sent test message, approved pricing recommendation during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise Live Dashboard at /enterprise-live with 4 tabs: Canli Operasyon (Live Operations), Mesajlasma (Messaging), Oto-Fiyatlama (Auto-Pricing), Entegrasyonlar (Integrations). All APIs at /api/enterprise/*. WebSocket endpoint at /api/enterprise/ws/live?token=JWT. Messaging providers are in mock mode - no actual SMS/Email/WhatsApp sent.

websocket_live: test_live_data - GET /api/enterprise/ws/live-data returns front_desk_queue, housekeeping_board, vip_arrivals, audit_exceptions, occupancy
test_live_data_occupancy_fields - occupancy contains total_rooms, booked, available, pct
messaging: test_send_email_mock - POST /api/enterprise/messaging/send with email channel works (mock mode)
test_send_sms_mock - POST /api/enterprise/messaging/send with sms channel works (mock mode)
test_send_whatsapp_mock - POST /api/enterprise/messaging/send with whatsapp channel works (mock mode)
test_send_unknown_channel - POST with unknown channel returns 400
cross_module: test_event_propagation_cross_module - All integrations return status: ok

frontend_playwright_tests: 4 Tabs present: Canli Operasyon, Mesajlasma, Oto-Fiyatlama, Entegrasyonlar
Live Operations tab: Front Desk Queue, HK Board (4 tasks), VIP Arrivals, Audit Exceptions, Occupancy bar
Messaging tab: 3 provider health cards (Twilio/SendGrid/WhatsApp in mock), Analytics (9 messages, 77.8% success), Quick Send form, Delivery History
Auto-Pricing tab: Stats cards (Bekleyen/Uygulanan/Reddedilen/Geri Alinan), Pending Recommendations with Onayla/Reddet buttons, History with rollback
Integration tab: Run All button, 10 integration results with status badges
Interactive test: Successfully sent message via Messaging tab
Interactive test: Successfully approved pricing recommendation via Auto-Pricing tab

features: Live data (front desk, HK, VIP, audit, occupancy)

mocked_api_note: Twilio, SendGrid, WhatsApp providers are in MOCK mode (no API keys configured). Messages are simulated as successful sends but not actually delivered to external services.
